headline: ON Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Power-Driven Demand Aids Top Line
summary: Onsemi beats Q1 earnings as power-led growth and an AI data center "inflection point" support margins, big buybacks and a stronger Q2 outlook.

headline: FN Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Up on Strong Telecom & HPC
summary: Fabrinet posts record Q3 FY2026 revenues as Optical Communications powers big earnings growth, despite datacom supply constraints and new program ramps.

headline: Keysight Technologies (KEYS) Surges on Strong Earnings and AI-Driven Demand Across High-Growth Markets
summary: Ariel Investments, an investment management company, released its “Ariel Appreciation Fund” Q1 2026 Investor Letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The fund reported that the fund gained 1.14% during the quarter, underperforming both the Russell Midcap Value Index (+3.68%) and the Russell Midcap Index (+1.29%) amid a volatile, risk-off environment where […]

headline: Keysight and CATARC New Energy Vehicle Inspection Center Expand Strategic Collaboration to Advance Charging Test Technologies
summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif., May 05, 2026--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) announced an expanded strategic collaboration with China Automotive Technology and Research Center (CATARC) New Energy Vehicle Inspection Center, marked by the establishment of a Joint Innovation Laboratory for Charging Test Technology. This collaboration aims to accelerate innovation in new energy vehicles (NEV) testing, standards development, and charging technologies.
